audit_items.proof_trace: The loop at L67 is guarded by validation at L52 (ensure! custody_group_count <= number_of_custody_groups). All Grandine call paths use local custody_group_count (validator-computed at eip_7594/src/lib.rs::L411 or config-derived), not peer-reported values. Peer ENR updates trigger update_peer_columns_custody which iterates over constant P::NumberOfColumns::U64, independent of peer-advertised counts.
